name: golden-agile-backlog
description: Generic agile backlog preset for professional VerbatimDev demos.

workItems.title: Create searchable transcript library
workItems.description: Users need a transcript library that supports keyword search, speaker filtering, and quick navigation to source moments.
workItems.acceptanceCriteria:
• Search results highlight matching terms
  • Speaker and date filters can be combined
  • Selecting a result opens the transcript at the matching timestamp

lanes.frontend: Build the searchable transcript list, filter controls, and timestamp deep-link behavior.
lanes.backend: Add transcript search endpoint with speaker and date filters plus paged results.
lanes.qa: Verify combined filters, empty states, and timestamp navigation across at least 500 seeded transcript lines.

workItems.title: Generate meeting action items from transcript segments
workItems.description: Project managers need a reviewed action-item summary generated from meeting transcript segments.
workItems.acceptanceCriteria:
• Action items include owner, due date, source quote, and confidence
  • Low-confidence items require human review
  • Reviewed items can be exported as markdown

lanes.frontend: Add review queue controls and export affordance.
lanes.backend: Create summary job model, transcript-segment prompt context, and review status persistence.
lanes.qa: Test deterministic fixture output, low-confidence review flow, and markdown export.

workItems.title: Fix speaker labels drifting after transcript edits
workItems.description: Manual transcript edits can leave downstream speaker labels attached to the wrong text block.
workItems.acceptanceCriteria:
• Speaker labels remain stable after insert, split, and merge edits
  • Audit trail records the edit operation
  • Existing transcript exports are not reordered

lanes.frontend: Preserve visible speaker attribution while editing transcript blocks.
lanes.backend: Normalize transcript block IDs during split and merge operations.
lanes.qa: Run regression scenarios for insert, split, merge, undo, and export.

workItems.title: Add role-based sharing for transcript collections
workItems.description: Teams need to share transcript collections with viewer, commenter, and editor permissions.
workItems.acceptanceCriteria:
• Collection owners can invite users by email
  • Permissions are enforced by API and UI
  • Revoked users lose access immediately

lanes.frontend: Build member list, invite flow, and permission selector.
lanes.backend: Add collection permission model and authorization checks.
lanes.qa: Verify each role against list, detail, export, and mutation endpoints.
